name: MegaPascal
description: Megapascal unit for pressure and stress measurements, equal to one million pascals (1 MPa = 10^6 Pa). Commonly used in materials science for mechanical stress, tensile strength, and compression measurements.
ExpectedUse: Megapascal unit for pressure and stress measurements, equal to one million pascals (1 MPa = 10^6 Pa). Commonly used in materials science for mechanical stress, tensile strength, and compression measurements.

unitDescription.Name: Megapascal
unitDescription.Context: Materials testing, mechanical engineering, structural analysis, climate analysis
unitDescription.Definition: One megapascal equals one million pascals (1 MPa = 10^6 Pa), where one pascal is one newton per square metre.
unitDescription.Usage: Standard unit for stress measurements in materials testing per DIN EN ISO 204:2023-10 and in many other areas.
